title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
